research_question: Can we keep the recalibrated v7 momentum-only score and 0.70 ranking liquidity guard fixed, but replace the hard equal-weight Top10 slice with one smoother rank-decay extraction inside the same selected head, so that the weak signal edge is harvested with less cutoff noise and better fixed-test robustness?

guard_contract.guard_definition: Freeze the recalibrated v7 ranking guard: only rows that are already ranking_eligible_D0 and whose 20-day average amount cross-sectional liquidity rank is >= 0.70 on the same signal_date may enter the ranking universe.
guard_contract.treatment_of_rows_below_guard: Remain in audit tables but must be excluded from ranking_state_daily eligibility.

portfolio_extraction_contract.extraction_definition: Keep score and guard fixed. Replace the hard equal-weight Top10 slice with one deterministic rank-decay extraction that allocates capital only to the same selected ranks 1-10 on each signal_date, applies a fixed linear rank-decay multiplier, and renormalizes selected head weights to sum to 1.0 before cohort scaling.
portfolio_extraction_contract.weight_formula_detail: raw_multiplier(rank) = 1.00 - ((rank - 1) * (0.90 / 9)); rank 1 gets 1.00, rank 10 gets 0.10, ranks > 10 get 0.00

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same recalibrated v7 score and same 0.70 ranking liquidity guard

disallowed_changes: Do not change score features or score weights.
Do not change the recalibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or its stage.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not change sample labels or return definitions.
Do not sweep multiple head sizes.
Do not sweep multiple extraction formulas.
Do not combine this round with separate turnover suppression logic.
notes: This round changes exactly one core dimension: the score-to-portfolio extraction geometry.
The purpose is to test whether the weak momentum edge is better harvested by a smoother top-slice extraction than by the current hard equal-weight Top10 slice.
If this round fails, future work should not continue broad extraction sweeps inside the same research round.
